THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUFFEY, STEVEN $4,688.61 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,929.61, SEE SCANNED DOC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100046411) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
